title: koeleria cristata subsp. pyramidata
intro: Koeleria cristata subsp. pyramidata, also known as Purple Hair Grass or Pyramid Hair-grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Koeleria cristata subsp. pyramidata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are commonly used to treat digestive issues, colds, and respiratory problems.
